title: Create: Cotton
description: Adds Cotton and machines to Create.
body:
# Create: Cotton
This mod adds Cotton and machines to process Cotton to Create.

## Cotton
### Description
Let's you plant Cotton Seeds(found in chests in villages) to harvest Cotton.

### Crafting Cotton balls
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4ea3ebd9acb05352495584a1047002304cbdf9d.png)

## Thread Machine
### Description
Let's you process Cotton Balls to get a spools of Thread.

### Crafting Empty Spool
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/809d09bc2eaffe6f79aea908d6ea9d7d011b934a.png)

### Processing Cotton
Put dye(optional)(top side), Empty Spool and a minimum of 5 Cotton Balls (front side), per spool (right side), in the machine. Put a funnel on the side and watch the spools of Thread(left side) pour.

## Knitting Machine
### Description
Let's you process spools of Thread to make Fabric.

### Processing Thread
Put dye(optional)(front side) and Thread(right side) in the machine. Put a funnel on the side and watch the Fabric(left side) pour out of it.
